meaning: n.[植]海藻,海藻灰(可提取碘的)
examples: His plan is to establish giant "forests" of kelp seaweed (a type of algae) at the surface of the ocean.
We are seeing a decline in major ecosystems like kelp forests, sea life communities, coral reefs and so on.
After a little exploration through the thick growth of kelp and seagrass, he picks up a promising-looking rock.
Mr. Smith's kelp got its start in a University of Connecticut lab in Stamford.
In Key West, bikes bunch up around the bars like kelp at low tide.
